Third Account Of Wells Fargo Bank National Association And Robert P Anderson, Trustees, And Petition For Settlement Thereof
Off Calendar Feb-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were called together as they are all related: 292459, 292460, 292461, 292462, 292463 and 690457.

Appearances: Robert Anderson for Wells Fargo Bank.

Mr. Anderson addressed all of the issues raised in the Examiner's notes. The Court approved all of the accounting petitions (subject to signing of the written orders).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR #2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
